title: AI Engineer
description: Hands-on AI engineer embedding LLM-powered solutions into internal Sales, Marketing, and Support workflows. Owns initiatives end-to-end from discovery to deployment, building agents with Agno and n8n, integrating via APIs and orchestration tools including GitLab Duo Agent Platform. Ships working prototypes in days, measures flow metrics and ROI, and is expected to say 'this doesn't need AI' when true. Stack: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, Anthropic and OpenAI APIs.

title: Senior AI Engineer
description: Leads the full lifecycle of generative-AI solutions across a B2B payments platform: designs and deploys LLM-powered workflows, RAG pipelines, OCR, and agentic systems while architecting secure scalable cloud infra. Builds APIs and data pipelines, implements MLOps/DevOps, and mentors juniors. Stack: Python, LangChain, LangGraph, FastAPI, GCP/AWS/Azure, Kubernetes, Docker, PostgreSQL, Elasticsearch.

title: Lead Engineer / Founding Engineer
description: Founding/lead engineer at an early-stage startup reimagining enterprise IT-services delivery with AI agents plus humans to build, integrate, and run the enterprise stack. Owns architecture across agentic systems and full-stack product. Stack: LangChain, LangGraph, Pinecone, Weaviate, Hugging Face, Python, TypeScript, React, Next.js, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform.

title: AI Engineer - Finance Automations & Orchestration
description: Designs and builds agent-to-agent (A2A) systems that coordinate workflows across services for finance use cases. Translates finance business problems into AI-driven solutions, working with OpenAI API and open-source LLMs, plus RAG and prompt engineering on real use cases. Stack: Python, OpenAI API, RAG, Azure, AWS, SQL, databases. Mid-level applied LLM role at a finance-focused team.

title: AI/ML Engineer - GenAI (RAG and Agentic AI Frameworks)
description: Senior ML engineer / applied scientist building scalable RAG systems and agentic architectures, with a focus on optimizing LLM inference using vLLM/SGLang. Production GenAI work spanning retrieval, agents, and serving performance. Stack: Python, RAG, agentic frameworks, vLLM, SGLang, LLM inference optimization. Industry experience in Python required; ML/AI model knowledge preferred.

title: AI/ML Engineer - Multi-Agent & Voice AI
description: Designs and ships end-to-end AI/ML features across a product suite and client projects. Builds agentic systems with LangChain/LangGraph and FastAPI, integrates voice pipelines (Whisper STT/TTS), architects knowledge graphs (Neo4j) and vector DBs (ChromaDB) for multimodal RAG, and fine-tunes/prompt-engineers Claude, GPT, and open-source models. Deploys on GCP/AWS/Azure via Docker and CI/CD. Broad full-stack-plus-AI scope.

title: SDE II - Agentic Engineer
description: Builds agentic systems for an AI customer-service platform. Mid-level software engineer focused on orchestration and LLM tool-use in production, using n8n and the OpenAI API to wire automation workflows and agent behaviors. Stack: n8n, OpenAI API, production agent engineering.

title: Applied AI Engineer (Agentic Systems & Reputation Intelligence)
description: Applied AI engineer building agentic systems for reputation-intelligence products. Designs multi-step agent workflows and LLM integrations against Gemini and OpenAI APIs, productionizing retrieval and tool-use. Stack: Gemini, OpenAI API, agentic orchestration, Python. Remote India, applied/product-facing AI role focused on shipping agent features into a live product rather than research.

title: AI Engineer - FDE (Forward Deployed Engineer)
description: Forward-deployed AI engineer working directly with customers to design and ship agentic and RAG solutions on the Databricks platform. Builds DSPy and LangChain agents, tunes retrieval, and operationalizes GenAI for enterprise use cases. Stack: DSPy, LangChain, Databricks, Hugging Face, PyTorch, scikit-learn, AWS, Python. Mid-level, remote India; customer-facing applied AI.

title: Senior AI Engineer
description: Senior AI engineer building multi-agent systems for field-service automation. Designs and orchestrates agents with AutoGen and CrewAI, integrating LLMs into production workflows. Stack: AutoGen, CrewAI, Python, agentic orchestration.

title: Senior Backend Engineer - AI Agents
description: Senior backend engineer building AI agents, RAG pipelines, and LLM products for a conversational-intelligence platform. Owns the backend services that run agent orchestration and retrieval at scale. Stack: Python, RAG, LLM APIs, backend services.

title: Staff Machine Learning Engineer (Agentic AI/Gen AI)
description: Staff-level ML engineer building agentic AI, RAG pipelines, and LLM products inside a cybersecurity platform. Sets technical direction for GenAI features and mentors across teams. Stack: agentic frameworks, RAG, LLM APIs, Python, cloud.

title: Staff Software Engineer - India
description: Staff engineer at an agentic data-science startup building AI agents, RAG pipelines, and LLM products. Listed pay band is an unusually wide $50k-$120k. Stack: agentic frameworks, RAG, LLM APIs, Python.

title: Senior AI SDET
description: Senior software-development-engineer-in-test focused on AI systems: builds test harnesses and evaluation tooling for agentic and LLM features rather than building the agents themselves. Touches AutoGen, CrewAI, and related frameworks. Stack: AutoGen, CrewAI, test automation, Python.

title: Data/ML Engineer
description: Data/ML engineer building the pipelines and data plumbing that feed LLM and retrieval systems. Works alongside the AI stack (LangChain, LlamaIndex) but the role centers on data engineering, ingestion, and ML support rather than building agents directly. Stack: Python, LangChain, LlamaIndex, data pipelines.

title: Software Development Engineer III - AI and Analytics
description: Senior backend/software engineer on an AI-and-analytics team in cybersecurity. Builds product features and services that integrate AWS Bedrock and Anthropic models, but the weight of the role is software engineering and analytics infrastructure rather than core agent/LLM research. Stack: AWS Bedrock, Anthropic, backend services.

title: GenAI Data ETL Engineer
description: ETL/data engineer for GenAI systems: builds the ingestion and transformation pipelines that populate vector stores and feed RAG. Touches the agentic stack (Agno, Pinecone) but the job is data movement and quality, not agent design. Stack: Pinecone, Agno, ETL pipelines, Python.

title: Backend Engineer (MongoDB / API Integrations / AWS / Vectorization)
description: Backend engineer building systems that power intelligent data products, with expertise in MongoDB, data vectorization, and AI/LLM integrations. Core work is backend service development and API integration; the AI/LLM piece is integration-layer, not model or agent building. Stack: MongoDB, AWS, REST APIs, vectorization. Adjacent role where backend skills dominate and AI is a feature surface.

title: Full-Stack Engineer (FastAPI + Next.js, LLM Integration)
description: Full-stack role building FastAPI backends and Next.js frontends, integrating multiple LLM APIs (OpenAI, Groq, Gemini) with fallback/retry logic, and converting AI diagnostics into client reports. Works directly with the founder; growth path into senior AI engineering. Real LLM-integration work but full-stack-weighted and early-stage.

title: Associate Software Engineer, AI
description: Entry-level/associate software engineer on an AI team, contributing to LangChain and LangGraph-based features under senior guidance. AI exposure is real but junior and supervised; most of the work is general software engineering. Stack: LangChain, LangGraph.

title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer (Computer Vision & GenAI)
description: Owns end-to-end development of computer-vision and generative-AI problem statements, from ideation through deployment and post-launch ML monitoring. Researches, designs, trains, and deploys scalable ML systems for vision use cases, and optimizes training and inference pipelines to maximize GPU utilization and cut costs. Heavy model-training/CV focus rather than LLM-app glue.

title: Machine Learning Engineer - Computer Vision & NLP
description: Trains and optimizes deep-learning models for real-time detection (YOLO v6/v7/v8), CNNs, and transformers. Handles model quantization, conversion, and hardware-specific optimization, builds image preprocessing/augmentation/annotation pipelines, and works large datasets for training and evaluation. Some NLP (NER, summarization, sentiment) and OpenAI API exposure. Stack: Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, OpenCV, Scikit-learn. Classic training-heavy CV/ML role.

title: Applied AI - Machine Learning Engineer
description: Builds and maintains scalable MLOps pipelines - data ingestion, feature engineering, model training, validation, deployment, monitoring, and retraining. Combines classical ML with some GenAI patterns (RAG, vector DBs, agents) but the core is model lifecycle and production ML ops. Stack: Python, Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch, AWS/Databricks, CI/CD, containerization.

title: Senior ML Engineer / Applied Scientist (Geospatial ML Platform)
description: Builds end-to-end ML/MLOps infrastructure from the ground up: data ingestion, transformation, training, testing, deployment, and production monitoring. Uses GPU computing for data and model parallelism across PyTorch/PyTorch Lightning/TensorFlow, with geospatial/remote-sensing data. Stack: Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, AWS, Spark, Dask, ElasticSearch, SQL. Heavy training-infrastructure role; no LLM-agent component.

title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer - NLP
description: Senior NLP-focused ML engineer building and fine-tuning language models for a conversational-intelligence product, plus LangChain-based features. More model/NLP depth than app-glue, but with applied LLM overlap. Stack: LangChain, NLP, Python, model training.

title: Machine Learning Engineer - Computer Vision (Retail LVM)
description: Leads CV model development - detection, recognition, segmentation, tracking - and advances an in-house Large Vision Model for retail. Builds synthetic-data pipelines, benchmarks, and MLOps automation. Requires a PhD (or equivalent) in CV/ML and a record of large-scale production CV deployment. Stack: Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow.

title: Machine Learning Analyst (Gen AI)
description: ML analyst role applying GenAI to fintech problems: model evaluation, analysis, and applied experimentation rather than full agent engineering. Stack: Python, ML, GenAI tooling.

title: AI Partner / High-Ticket AI Sales (Freelance)
description: Despite the 'AI' title, this is pure B2B SaaS sales: collaborate with sales teams to optimize outreach and close deals in the $1,000-$1,500 range, manage Salesforce pipelines, and articulate technical concepts to buyers. Freelance, fully remote, commission-only paid quarterly, flexible hours. No engineering.

title: AI Sales Representative (Title Company)
description: 'AI-enabled' framing is marketing veneer over a 1099, commission-only sales role with full residual on every title processed, no territory, no base. Heavy hype language ('AI-driven secret sauce', 'disrupting the title industry'), multi-touch outreach scripts provided. Zero technical AI work.

title: Specialist Seller, AI Products
description: An 'AI Products' title that is fundamentally enterprise sales: drives go-to-market execution, architects deals, builds partnerships, develops adoption metrics, and requires extensive AI-based selling experience. Tools are Salesforce/Clari, not Python or LLMs.

title: Customer Success Manager, AI Solutions
description: Pilots and scales AI-powered solutions with go-to-market teams and champions internal workflow tooling, but the role is customer-success/strategy: influencing senior leaders, build-or-buy judgment, presenting to SVP/C-level. Requires 'AI fluency' but no hands-on engineering - no code, models, or pipelines.

title: Director of Partnerships (Legal AI)
description: Defines and executes a legal-tech company's partnership strategy, building revenue-generating partnerships and collaborating cross-functionally to hit growth targets. 'AI' is the product domain, not the work; this is a business-development leadership role with no engineering content. Stack: CRM, partnerships, GTM. Tests AI-washed detection on a senior non-technical title at a real AI company.

title: AI Trainer - Advanced Video and Image Annotation
description: Freelance AI trainer completing data-annotation tasks - analyzing, editing, and writing annotations - to train and evaluate AI models, after passing a short skills test. Genuinely contributes to AI systems (RLHF/eval) but is hourly gig work with no engineering, design, or system-building. Stack: annotation tools (Labelbox, CVAT).

title: AI Data Quality Specialist - AI Trainer
description: Contractor 'AI trainer' on a coding-task platform: creates and solves programming problems, builds small apps, and synthesizes data analysis so models can learn from the outputs. Real coding involved, but it's piecework data generation, not a software-engineering role with ownership, deployment, or a team.

title: Senior Backend Engineer (Java, Spring Boot, AWS)
description: Straightforward backend engineering: design and develop scalable microservices and REST APIs in Java and Spring Boot on AWS. No AI, ML, LLM, or agent component anywhere in the role. Stack: Java, Spring Boot, AWS, microservices.

title: Java Developer (Contract to Hire)
description: Experienced Java developer working with Spring Framework, MVC, JUnit, Hibernate/JPA, Tomcat, and SQL, 5-7 years required. Conventional enterprise Java work, no AI/ML. Stack: Java, Spring, Hibernate, SQL.

title: Java Software Engineer
description: Full-time hybrid Java engineer designing, developing, and maintaining software applications with microservices architecture and the Spring Framework. Collaborates cross-functionally to ship features. No AI/ML/LLM content. Stack: Java, Spring, microservices.

title: Backend Engineer (Node.js, NestJS)
description: Backend engineer designing scalable microservices and distributed systems with strong PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Docker, and AWS/Azure skills, with an ownership mindset. No AI/ML/LLM in scope - standard product backend work. Stack: Node.js, NestJS, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Docker.

title: Data Engineer (Python + GCP/AWS + PySpark)
description: Builds and maintains scalable data pipelines and cloud data solutions, transforming raw data into analytics-ready datasets, 5-9 years experience. Strong data engineering but no AI/ML, RAG, or LLM component. Stack: Python, GCP/AWS, PySpark, SQL.

title: Full Stack Developer (Node.js, React, MongoDB)
description: Builds backend services and REST APIs with Node.js/Express and responsive React frontends, manages MySQL/DynamoDB schemas, and maintains AWS cloud infrastructure. General full-stack product engineering with no AI/ML/LLM work. Stack: Node.js, Express, React, MySQL, DynamoDB, AWS.

title: Forward Deployed Software Engineer
description: 2-5 years software engineering. Deep familiarity with LLM orchestration frameworks (LangChain, LlamaIndex, CrewAI, LangGraph). End-to-end deployment of working AI agents in production - not a demo. Set up eval pipelines and define meaningful quality metrics. Hands-on with MCP servers. SQL + NoSQL at scale, Kafka/SQS messaging. High agency expected.

title: AI Engineer - Python, LangChain, LangGraph, Agentic AI, LLMs
description: 7-13 years experience. Design and implement Agentic AI workflows using LangChain and LangGraph. Build LLM-powered APIs with Python. Work on RAG pipelines over enterprise documents. Integrate with internal vector databases (pgvector, Pinecone). Required: Python, LangChain, LangGraph, REST/GraphQL API design, AWS Bedrock or Azure OpenAI experience.

title: AI Agent Development Intern
description: Unpaid internship for 3 months with possible PPO. Build LLM agents using LangChain. Stipend: 'Performance-based, ranges INR 5,000 to 15,000/month'. Requirements: BTech CS final year or freshly graduated. Working knowledge of Python, LangChain, OpenAI APIs. 40 hours per week commitment.

title: Senior LLM Engineer (Contract)
description: 20 hours/week contract role, 3-6 month engagement. US-based AI-native SMB needs senior LLM engineer to ship a hybrid RAG pipeline with reranking + Ragas evals. Stack: Python, LangChain, pgvector, Cohere rerank, Modal deploy, Langfuse tracing. Rate: $80-105/hour USD. Async-first team, weekly Friday sync.

title: AI Consultant (Project-Based)
description: Project: build a custom GPT/Claude integration for our CRM. Fixed-price $2,500 USD. Deliverables: working Python script, documentation, 30-day support. No long-term commitment. 5+ Upwork reviews preferred. Description very thin, no info on actual stack, scale, or evaluation expectations.

title: AI Co-Founder / Tech Partner Needed
description: Package approx INR 18L/yr. Not a job - it's a partnership opportunity. We're into manufacturing premium monopoly industrial instruments. Need 4 partners with AI expertise in Digital Marketing generalist, Web Dev - Graphic/video & LeadGen to scale globally. No salary - revenue share. Reply with thumbs-up emoji to apply.

title: Crypto x AI Founding Engineer (Equity)
description: Equity-only role 1-3%. Build the next AI agent layer for DeFi. Need someone who can ship LLM agents + smart contract integration. Vague on what we're actually building - will explain on a call. No salary for first 6 months. Telegram-first communication. Series of viral X posts as proof of traction.

title: Junior AI/ML Engineer
description: 0-2 years experience. Work on India's foundational AI model stack. CTC INR 12-18 LPA fixed + ESOPs. Required: strong Python, PyTorch fundamentals, exposure to one of (training/fine-tuning, inference optimization, evals). Some training data work, some application-layer work. Note: company has documented culture concerns per Blind reviews; apply with eyes open.

title: ML Training Engineer
description: Train and fine-tune foundation models for Indic languages. PyTorch + distributed training (FSDP, DeepSpeed). Manage GPU clusters, data pipelines for pretraining at scale. Not application engineering - this is foundational ML/training infrastructure. 3+ years required. MS in CS preferred but not required if equivalent experience.

title: AI Customer Success Manager
description: Drive customer adoption of our AI-powered analytics platform. 5+ years in customer-facing roles (CSM, account management, solutions engineering). 'AI' in the title - role involves zero AI engineering. Help customers configure prompts and dashboards. Salary: $90-140k OTE (heavy commission). No coding required.

title: Founding Engineer
description: Build after-action review platform for fire departments. Own codebase architecture and UX end-to-end. Stack: FlutterFlow, Firebase, Node, Groq/AssemblyAI transcription, Gemini summarization. Founding equity scaled to scope. Uses LLM APIs but core is full-stack product build.

title: Senior Software Engineer
description: Build brand measurement analytics platform processing ad exposure and survey data. APIs, data pipelines, productionizing analytics workflows with AI. Stack: Kotlin/Java, Python, React, MySQL, DynamoDB, AWS, Kubernetes, LLM orchestration. Comp $150k-$175k + bonus/equity.

title: Founding Customer Success Manager (AI-first)
description: Own onboarding, support, QBRs, renewals for HR analytics SaaS. Use Claude to triage tickets, write docs, automate repetitive tasks. Requires 100+ hours hands-on AI agent experience. Comp $16k-$26k base + commission. AI in title but role is customer success, not engineering.

title: Product Engineer
description: Build product analytics and developer tools at scale. Solve distributed systems and ML problems. ClickHouse, Python, TypeScript, React. Platform engineering, backend, clickhouse operations. Public comp calculator.

title: Senior Developer (Full-stack)
description: Build real-time structural design and analysis tools for AEC. 3D modeling, design feedback, performance optimization. Early-stage startup. No AI/ML in the role. Comp not specified.

title: Full-Stack Engineer
description: Build open-source platform for background jobs at scale. Distributed task queues and durable execution. Used for log pipelines, code review agents, GPU scheduling. Stack: Postgres, Go, TypeScript, React, Kubernetes. Infra that serves AI workloads, not AI itself.

title: Founding Full-Stack Engineer
description: Build AI operating system for enterprise fleet operations. Real-world adversarial data: telematics, recalls, invoices. Agents execute workflows autonomously. Stack: TypeScript, React, NestJS, PostgreSQL, AWS. Comp $175k-$450k + 2-5% equity. Onsite + senior.

title: Software Engineer
description: Build compiler and visual editor for biology lab robots. Parse plain-language protocols into structured format, compile to optimized code. Stack: OCaml compiler, Python backend, TypeScript/React editor. Comp $140k-$180k + equity. Compiler/robotics, not ML.

title: Field Engineer
description: Company builds Tabular Foundation Models for structured-data predictions. Role: demos, docs, integrations, customer adoption. Python, data-science fundamentals, model-training knowledge required. Customer-facing field role, not core model building. Comp not specified.

title: ML Engineer
description: Apply AI to civil, structural, MEP engineering firms. Automate design workflows, build tools for AI-assisted design. Comp $150k-$300k + equity. Onsite NYC. Real ML/AI engineering work.

title: Perception Engineer
description: Build computer-vision systems for aquaculture monitoring. Detect sea lice, quantify fish weights, optimize feeding. Custom underwater cameras, ML, cloud pipelines. CV/ML core role. Comp not specified.

title: Full-Stack CV/ML Systems Engineer
description: Build real-time drone detection and tracking. Deploy CV/ML on NVIDIA edge devices (Jetson/TensorRT). Contract, flexible hours. CV/ML core.

title: Senior AI Engineer
description: Own end-to-end LLM product surfaces in clinical/HIPAA environment. Run rigorous evaluations and experiments across prompts, retrieval, and agents while shipping fast. Requires strong Python and NLP fundamentals. Compensation: $180k-220k.

title: AI/ML Engineer
description: Build knowledge graph from web data for go-to-market teams identifying org structure, tech stack, and key projects. Product has strong product-market fit and early revenue. Team of 25 from Google, Meta, Snowflake, Kaggle. Raised $38.5MM from top-tier VCs.

title: MTS, Research Engineer
description: Research engineer position focused on building AI to simulate the world. Part of team merging art and science with models and infrastructure for creative tools. Remote-friendly with offices across NYC, SF, Seattle, London, Tel Aviv, and Tokyo. Full benefits including unlimited PTO.

title: Machine Learning Software Engineer
description: Build AI-powered medical imaging solutions using deep learning across MRI, PET, and CT modalities. Integrate seamlessly into existing healthcare workflows. Team includes radiologists and scientists from Stanford, Harvard, MIT. Solutions deployed on 1,000+ scanners globally.

title: Dataframe SDK Engineer
description: Engineer data layer for physical AI including robotics and autonomous systems. Work on Rust-based SDK for logging, querying, visualizing multimodal data. Performance-critical code emphasizes Rust with egui. Part of team building unified data infrastructure.

title: Bayesian Software Engineering
description: Build systems representing domain knowledge as modular probabilistic models for finance and scientific research. Applications include equity valuation, distress monitoring, particle physics. Work with uncertainty propagation and consistency enforcement across flexible model structures.

title: Integration Engineer
description: Detail-obsessed mid-to-senior engineer (~5-10 yrs) to investigate customer problems, drive integrations end-to-end, and own specs. Uses AI extensively while maintaining close oversight. Golang backend, custom database engine, server-side HTML rendering. Requires comfortable spoken English for client calls.

title: Distributed Data Infrastructure Engineer
description: Build autoscaling systems for cloud database and distributed caching layer on S3. Experience with productionizing distributed systems, cloud-based caches essential. Go, Kubernetes, distributed systems expertise required. On-call rotation includes production debugging.

title: Founding Engineer (Full-Stack)
description: Ship AI-driven workflow automation for healthcare clinics. Build end-to-end with Next.js and Django including integrations, webhooks, background jobs. Own reliability and pragmatic HIPAA-aware security. Uses LLM APIs extensively for healthcare operations.

title: Radar AI Engineer
description: Own full pipeline end-to-end: raw FMCW/MIMO signal processing to deployed embedded models (ONNX, TensorRT, edge TPUs). Build radar + ML for smart cities, sports analytics, defense perception. Real hardware with real customers including Dutch police and KLM.
